creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
unrar-iconv-4.10,5 could not be built

It is raised by archivers/unrar/Makefile's post-patch target.

Fix: patch this file to unrar-iconv or fix unrar

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.10.20120114180333/unrar-iconv-4.10,5.log
